command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
T="8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g"
echo "=== Bot DESCRIPTION (shown when bot is added/started) ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot$T/getMyDescription" | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== Bot SHORT description (about) ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot$T/getMyShortDescription" | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== Bot COMMANDS (the menu) ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot$T/getMyCommands" | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== Bot NAME ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot$T/getMyName" | python3 -m json.tool
REMOTE
